label: v1.0 Reader Overlay
purpose: Track semantic human-reader edition deltas for the v1.0 major reader source without hand-editing generated manuscripts.
delta_source_policy: This manifest and operation files under editions/reader_overlays/v1_0/chapters/ are the editable source for v1.0 reader-only semantic deltas.
The generated reader manuscript under build/reader_edition/ is disposable and must not be edited as a canonical source.
The generated reader_delta_report.md is a review report, not an input patch file and not a canonical manuscript.

Reader overlays may adapt presentation for interested human readers, but they must not introduce new source-derived claims, proof results, benchmark results, runtime results, or support-state promotions.

generated_report_contract.purpose: Record strip transformations, reader-language transformations, overlay source files, applied operations, content digests, before/after excerpts, skipped planned or retired operations, review checks, and non-claims for the derived reader source.
generated_report_contract.manual_edit_policy: Review this report after generation; change reader deltas by editing tracked overlay operations or canonical chapter source, then regenerate.

manual_edit_policy: Do not edit build/reader_edition as canonical source.
Use overlays only for reader-edition deltas that should survive regeneration.
Use canonical chapters when the change should affect live AI view, live Human view, research releases, proof hooks, source maps, or future writing runs.
non_claims: This overlay manifest is not a published reader edition.
This overlay manifest does not claim that EPUB, PDF, DOCX, HTML, audiobook, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts exist.
This overlay manifest does not promote any claim support state.
